data.title: AS Tallinna Vesi to present Q2 2025 results in investor webinar; inviting shareholders, investors, analysts, and stakeholders.
data.description: AS Tallinna Vesi is hosting an investor conference webinar to present the results for the second quarter and first six months of 2025. The webinar is open to shareholders, investors, analysts, and interested stakeholders. This event will provide a comprehensive overview of the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc received notification that Baker Steel Resources Trust Ltd has crossed a threshold for a relevant change.
data.description: In St. Helier, Jersey on July 25, 2025, Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc disclosed that Baker Steel Resources Trust Ltd has surpassed a threshold triggering a notification of a significant change, as per the AIM Rules for Companies. Caledonia, listed on NYSE American under CMCL, AIM under CMCL, and VFEX under CMCL, shared this development.
Annual financial report released, AGM notice issued. Key details: important numbers available.

data.title: Abivax fully exercises underwriters' option to buy additional ADSs, raising offering proceeds to $747.5M (€637.5M).
data.description: Abivax has confirmed that the underwriters have fully exercised their option to purchase additional ADSs, leading to a total gross proceeds of $747.5 million (€637.5 million) from the offering.

data.title: Kalmar's financial report for Jan-June 2025 shows robust performance with high order intake in Q2.
data.description: According to recent data, the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached over 300,000, with nearly 15,000 new cases reported in the past 24 hours. The death toll has also risen to over 5,000, with 300 new fatalities recorded today. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus. The government has implemented stricter measures in heavily affected regions to control the situation. Additionally, over 200,000 individuals have recovered from the virus so far, bringing a glimmer of hope amidst the ongoing crisis.

data.title: Dogwifhat price plummets by 7.25% to $1.01 on mixed momentum signals. Short-term outlook bearish, key support at $0.82 holds firm.
data.description: The price of WIF has dropped to $1.01 following bearish short-term signals, but the longer-term trend remains positive, with key support at $0.82 remaining stable. This indicates a potential buying opportunity with a strong support level in place.

data.title: Loomis reports revenues of SEK 7.4 billion with 3.8% organic growth in Q2 2025, showing solid performance.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, our company reported a robust organic growth and a strong operating margin. Our revenues for the period amounted to SEK 7.4 billion, showcasing a noteworthy organic growth rate of 3.8 percent. The increase in revenue was supported by strategic acquisitions, while the appreciation of the Swedish Krona also had an impact on our performance.

data.title: Bureau Veritas sees robust organic revenue growth and strong margin increase in H1 2025, with revenue at EUR 3,192.5 million (5.7% YoY), adjusted operating profit at EUR 491.5 million (8.8% YoY increase) and operating margin at 15.4%.
data.description: In the first half of 2025, Bureau Veritas reported significant financial growth. Their revenue reached EUR 3,192.5 million, showing a 5.7% increase from the previous year. Organically, there was a 6.7% rise, with Q2 specifically experiencing 6.2% organic growth. The adjusted operating profit also saw a notable surge, reaching EUR 491.5 million, which is an 8.8% increase compared to H1 2024's EUR 451.9 million. This represented an adjusted operating margin of 15.4%, up by 44 basis points year-on-year and 55 basis points at constant currency. The operating profit stood at EUR 513.1 million.

data.title: Eric Trump agrees that Ethereum is undervalued, should be over $8,000. Ted Pillows notes ETH growth should actually be above $8,000 now, comparing it to the M2 money supply.
data.description: The executive vice president of The Trump Organization, Eric Trump, recently commented on the undervaluation of Ethereum (ETH) in the crypto market. Trump concurred with cryptocurrency analyst Ted Pillows, who stated that ETH should be trading above $8,000 based on its growth compared to the global M2 money supply. The M2 money supply includes liquid assets like cash, deposits, and short-term savings. Pillows emphasized that ETH's current value does not align with its growth and labeled it as one of the most promising trades. The complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FIBRA Macquarie México reports solid Q2 2025 results with leasing of 1.3M sq feet, 80% tenant retention, 18.1% YoY increase in NOI.
data.description: In Mexico City, FIBRA Macquarie México (FIBRAMQ) (BMV: FIBRAMQ) released its financial and operating outcomes for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. Key highlights from Q2 2025 include leasing activities encompassing 1.3 million square feet of GLA within the Industrial portfolio, with 424 thousand square feet dedicated to early renewals. Strong tenant retention rates at around 80% were reported for both Industrial and Retail portfolios. Furthermore, the consolidated NOI for Q2 2025 saw an 18.1% year-over-year increase in Peso terms. Additionally, details on consolidated 2Q25 AFFO were provided.

data.title: Michael Saylor's company, Strategy Inc., increases preferred stock offering from $500M to $2B for Bitcoin acquisitions.
data.description: Strategy Inc., Michael Saylor's Bitcoin holding company, has increased its preferred equity issuance to $2 billion from $500 million. The company plans to issue 5 million shares of Series A Perpetual Stretch Preferred Stock with an initial dividend of 9%, priced at $90 each, a discount from the face value of $100 per share. The funds raised will be used for general corporate purposes, including Bitcoin acquisitions. This marks a significant increase from the initial offering and demonstrates Strategy Inc.'s confidence in the current market conditions.
